sections.content:
UP moved the black L-shape (id 5) up by 3 rows (from row 15 to row 12). The other shapes didn't move. So UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT move the selected shape. Now I need to figure out which shape is "selected" and what the goal is the goal.
Looking at the board:
- Left panel: black L-shape with white dots (id 5, boundary starting at [15,18])
- Right top: dark gray L (id 6, boundary starting at [15,36])  
- Right bottom: yellow L (id 12, boundary starting at [45,5,51])
The black L with white dots inside seems to be the "player" piece. The goal might be to move it to match one of the other L-shapes.
Let me try to move the black L to the position of the dark gray L-shape. The dark gray L-shape is at [15,36] and the black L is at [12,18]. I need RIGHT to move it to col 18→36, and... wait, the black is on the left panel and the gray is on the right panel. There's a divider between them.
Let me try moving the black L to match the yellow L at [45,51]. That would require DOWN and RIGHT. But there's a divider...
Actually, wait. The black L is on the left panel (cols 18-26) and the yellow L is on the right panel (cols 51-59). They can't cross the divider.
Maybe the goal is to match the shape's orientation. The black L is rotated differently from the others. Let me look at the shapes:
- Black L (id 5): boundary [[15,18], [15,2,26], [20,26], [20,24], [23,24], [23,22], [23,18]] - this is an L pointing down-right
- Gray L (id 6): boundary [[15,36], [15,44], [17,44], [17,39], [22,39], [22,36]] - L pointing down-left
- Yellow L (id 12): boundary [[45,51], [45,59], [47,59], [47,54], [52,54], [52,51]] - L pointing down-left
The black L has white dots inside it. Maybe I need to SPACE to rotate it?
Let me try SPACE to rotate the black L to the gray L's orientation. The black L is currently at [12,18]. I need to move it to [15,36]. But wait, the gray is at cols 36-44, which is on the right panel. The black L is on the left panel (cols 18-26). They can't cross the divider.
Hmm, maybe the goal is to match the yellow L on the right panel? Or maybe I need to move the black L to overlap exactly with the gray L's shape.
Let me try SPACE to rotate.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:

<parameter=code>

action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
